dashboard.label: NeuralWatch - EU AI Act Compliance
dashboard.description: Module D: EU AI Act compliance tracking across Articles 9, 13, 14, 17, and 72.

search.query: | inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | where disclosure_enabled=1 AND human_review_required=0 | stats count as compliant
index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" | spath | eval risk_level=upper(risk_level) | where risk_level="HIGH" OR risk_level="CRITICAL" | stats count as incidents
| inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | where human_review_required=1 | stats count as needs_review
index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | spath | stats count as total, sum(eval(if(status="error",1,0))) as errors | eval error_pct=round(errors/total*100,1) | fields error_pct

table.title: Per-Service EU AI Act Compliance Scorecard

search.query: | inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | join type=left service [search index=neuralwatch_ai_calls earliest=-24h | spath | stats count as total_calls, sum(eval(if(status="error",1,0))) as errors by service] | join type=left service [search index=neuralwatch_injections earliest=-24h | spath | eval is_high=if(upper(risk_level)="HIGH" OR upper(risk_level)="CRITICAL",1,0) | stats sum(is_high) as injection_events by service] | eval art9_score=if(isnull(injection_events) OR injection_events<5, 100, max(0,100-injection_events*5)) | eval art13_score=if(disclosure_enabled=1,100,0) | eval art14_score=if(human_review_required=0,100,round(human_review_threshold*100,0)) | eval art17_score=if(isnull(errors) OR isnull(total_calls) OR total_calls=0,100,round((1-errors/total_calls)*100,0)) | eval art72_score=90 | eval overall_score=round((art9_score+art13_score+art14_score+art17_score+art72_score)/5,1) | eval status=case(overall_score>=90,"✅ COMPLIANT",overall_score>=70,"⚠️ AT RISK",1=1,"❌ NON-COMPLIANT") | table service, status, overall_score, art9_score, art13_score, art14_score, art17_score, art72_score | sort -overall_score

chart.title: Art. 9 - Injection Incidents by Service (High + Critical)

search.query: index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" | spath | eval risk_level=upper(risk_level) | where risk_level="HIGH" OR risk_level="CRITICAL" | stats count as injection_incidents by service | sort -injection_incidents
index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" | spath | eval risk_level=upper(risk_level) | stats count by risk_level | sort -count

chart.title: Art. 13 - Disclosure Compliance Status per Service

search.query: | inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | eval disclosure_status=case(disclosure_enabled=1 AND human_review_required=0,"Fully Compliant",disclosure_enabled=1,"Disclosure Only",1=1,"Non-Compliant") | stats count by disclosure_status

chart.title: Art. 14 - Human Oversight: Review Required vs Not Required

search.query: | inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | eval oversight=if(human_review_required=1,"Human Review Required","Automated - No Review") | stats count by oversight

chart.title: Art. 17 - Quality Management: Error Rate by Service %

search.query: index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | spath | stats count as total_calls, sum(eval(if(status="error",1,0))) as errors by service | eval error_rate=round(errors/total_calls*100,2) | sort -error_rate | fields service, error_rate

chart.title: Art. 72 - Systemic Risk: Latency Drift by Model (p50 vs p95)

search.query: index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | spath | stats p50(latency_ms) as p50, p95(latency_ms) as p95 by model | sort -p95

chart.title: Art. 9 - Live Injection Threat Activity (Last Hour)

search.query: index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" | spath | eval risk_level=upper(risk_level) | where risk_level="HIGH" OR risk_level="CRITICAL" | timechart span=1m count by risk_level

chart.title: Art. 17 - AI Call Quality Over Time (Error vs Success)

search.query: index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | spath | timechart span=5m count(eval(status="success")) as success, count(eval(status="error")) as errors
